$comment: Layer D for LOCKER: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (group REDEFINES RG). WS-MONEY REDEFINES WS-REC leaf for leaf: WS-MEM-KEY derives from WS-MEM-ID (shift 0) and WS-BAL-DOL from WS-BAL-CENTS with a decimal shift of 2 - symmetric with the modern side's movePointLeft(2). KEY carries the id flow; FEE carries the balance flow with the shift, the 25/1000 constants and half-up rounding; TOTAL joins them; TIER is control flow over the shifted view. The wrong-leaf re-slice (candidate B reads the money view from the id leaf) shows as FEE/TOTAL sourcing the wrong input.
